name: Webstore Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Control the look and functionality of your Neto webstore with the webstore settings. Settings can be found in the "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Webstore Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Site template set"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your website theme name. All website pages, templates and emails will be drawn from these folders in your site files."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Content type that represents product category menu"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select a content type to be used as your product category menu."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show E-commerce Software branding"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Each customer on your site will have a wishlist with this name."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", automatically approved otherwise an administrator will need to manually approve the reviews."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enable anonymous product reviews"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allows non registered users to post product reviews."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": category."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default sort order for product listings"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", Options: SKU, name, popular, highest_price, lowest_price."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show out of stock product at last"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show products that are out of stock at the end of thumb lists."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default thumbnail layout for product listings"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default thumbnail layout for product category pages on your website. Options: gallery, list or custom."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maximum number of items per category page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The maximum number of items displayed per category page. Paging will come into effect when the total number of items in a category exceeds this amount."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show lowest multi-level price as selling price on website"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If enabled lowest multi-level price will show as the selling price on website."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show products with no pricing"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If enabled products with no pricing or zero in the price field will display on your web store."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Display upsell page before checkout"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Display upsell page before checkout if an item has upsell products set up."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maximum number of items in upsell list"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The maximum number of upsell products displayed in the upsell list.
